name: Taudit
description: Fail unsafe CI/CD pipeline changes with taudit verify, scan, or graph in Azure Pipelines.
helpMarkDown: Use verify mode with a workspace-relative policy directory to gate merges. baselineRoot and other path inputs must stay workspace-relative; do not pass $(System.DefaultWorkingDirectory) or absolute paths. Graph mode can emit authority or exploit views for review artifacts.
author: Algol

inputs.name: paths
inputs.label: Paths
inputs.helpMarkDown: Newline-separated workspace-relative pipeline paths or directories. Do not pass $(System.DefaultWorkingDirectory) or other absolute Azure DevOps path variables.

inputs.name: adoOrg
inputs.label: ADO org
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional Azure DevOps org for variable-group enrichment. Requires project and PAT.

inputs.name: adoProject
inputs.label: ADO project
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional Azure DevOps project for variable-group enrichment. Requires org and PAT.

inputs.name: adoPat
inputs.label: ADO PAT
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional Azure DevOps PAT for variable-group enrichment. Prefer a secret pipeline variable or env: TAUDIT_ADO_PAT.

inputs.name: policy
inputs.label: Policy path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Required in verify mode. Workspace-relative file or directory only; do not pass $(System.DefaultWorkingDirectory) or other absolute Azure DevOps path variables.

inputs.name: suppressions
inputs.label: Suppressions file
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional workspace-relative path to a taudit suppressions file.

inputs.name: baselineRoot
inputs.label: Baseline root
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional workspace-relative baseline root, for example `.` or `.taudit`. Do not pass $(System.DefaultWorkingDirectory) or any absolute path.

inputs.name: output
inputs.label: Output file
inputs.helpMarkDown: Workspace-relative output path. For graph mode, the task captures stdout into this file. Do not target repository control or workflow files.

inputs.name: fallbackCargo
inputs.label: Fallback to cargo install
inputs.helpMarkDown: If release-asset install fails, install taudit with `cargo install --locked` into a workspace-local cache. This is the recovery path when Windows extraction dependencies are unavailable.
